_comment: A SAMPLE memory export in the openclaw/Mem0 shape — for testing demo/coherence_check.py. Mostly-coherent beliefs with two real contradictions, so CY lands mid-range like real memory. Replace with a real export to find real contradictions.

memories.content: The home thermostat is always set to 21C.
Thermostat is never above 19C to save energy.
The home wifi network is called Skylark.
Email auto-reply is enabled while the user is travelling.
Auto-reply is disabled, the user finds it rude.
The email signature includes the user's phone number.
The user travels for work about twice a month.
The user's partner is named Dana.
